title: Draft long-form post (LinkedIn / Substack / Newsletter)
description: Long-form prose draft generated by the daily draft_long job. body_md is markdown; sources are cited inline as [bucket](url). The frontend renders body_md and uses the sources[] array for an appendix or hover-citations.

meta_version.description: Methodology pin version this draft was produced under (added by meta.stamp()).

body_md.description: Markdown body. Verbatim quotes wrapped in > or "...". All factual claims cite a source from the sources[] array.

sources.description: All sources referenced in body_md. Frontend may render as appendix or hover-citations.
